sb_prompt: PLEASE DISCUSS MUSIC.  CAN YOU FIND MUSICIANSOR TYPES OF MUSIC THAT BOTH YOU AND THE OTHER CALLER LIKE?
turns: So, have you got any favorite musicians or types of music that you enjoy listening to?
Yeah, I really love classic rock. Artists like Led Zeppelin and Pink Floyd are some of my all-time favorites.
That's cool! I also enjoy listening to classic rock from time to time.
Great! Some of my favorite classic rock songs are "Stairway to Heaven" by Led Zeppelin and "Comfortably Numb" by Pink Floyd.
Oh, nice choices! "Comfortably Nummy" is one of my favorites too.
Awesome! What about other artists or genres you like besides classic rock?
Well, I also enjoy listening to pop music. My current favorite artist is Taylor Swift.
Got it. I don't listen to much pop music myself, but I've heard great things about Taylor Swift.
Yes, she has a lot of talent and her music is very catchy.
Definitely agree. Classic rock and pop music - we've got quite a mix there!
Exactly! It's always interesting to discover different tastes in music.
Absolutely! And sometimes finding common ground makes for even better conversations. I think we'll have plenty more topics to discuss then.

Agreed! Looking forward to our future chats!

*Call ends naturally*
Bye for now! Have a great day! See you later!

Bye! Take care! Talk to you soon!

*Call disconnected*
